name: TANDY LEATHER FACTORY INC
business: Tandy Leather Factory, Inc. is one of the world's largest specialty retailers of leather and leathercraft-related items. It sells products primarily through company-leased stores, global websites, and a commercial division. The company also produces leather lace, cut leather pieces, and most of the do-it-yourself kits sold in its stores and online.

exposures.sentence: We sell our products primarily through company-owned stores and through orders generated from our global websites, and through direct account representatives in our commercial division.
Failure to protect the integrity and security of personal information of our customers and employees could result in substantial costs, expose us to litigation and damage our reputation.
Improve our overall digital and technological capabilities to include artificial intelligence where applicable across our entire operation and channels.

catalysts.sentence: In the fourth quarter of 2025, the Company renewed the promissory note under its Credit Agreement with JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A. through October 31, 2026.
